description:
Perform a zero-downtime patch of the 'PAYROLL_CALC' package in the HR schema using Oracle Edition-Based Redefinition (EBR). In the base edition ('ORA$BASE'), implement the 'GET_BONUS(p_emp_id NUMBER)' function to return a constant 1000. Create a child edition named 'RELEASE_V2' where the function is updated to return 10% of the employee's salary from the EMPLOYEES table. Document the output of GET_BONUS(100) (Steven King) from both editions to /home/ga/Desktop/patch_validation.txt to verify isolation, then set the database-wide default edition to 'RELEASE_V2'.

Connection: localhost:
